message:
fix(paths): preserve intended PATH ordering across cheatsheet/info/smoke/status

Follow-up to d3153963. That commit widened the PATH-discovery set
and prepended `ACFS_BIN_DIR` first, but it still did one
`export PATH="$dir:$PATH"` per matching directory inside the
iteration loop. That subtle ordering bug meant:

  * the loop walked "preferred → fallbacks" in source order
    (ACFS_BIN_DIR, ~/.local/bin, ~/.acfs/bin, ~/.bun/bin, …), but
  * each iteration prepended to the *current* PATH, so the final
    PATH ended up reversed: the *last* matching dir came first,
    not the first.

In practice: an install with both `ACFS_BIN_DIR=/opt/acfs/bin` and
`~/google-cloud-sdk/bin` present produced a PATH beginning with
`~/google-cloud-sdk/bin:...`, which wasn't the intent — we
specifically want `$ACFS_BIN_DIR` in front.

The fix is the same pattern across all four call sites:

  1. snapshot `current_path="${PATH:-}"`, use it as the loop's
     membership test (`seen_path=":${current_path}:"`).
  2. collect distinct, existing dirs into a `to_prepend` array in
     the iteration order we actually want.
  3. `prefix="$(IFS=:; printf '%s' "${to_prepend[*]}")"`
  4. `export PATH="$prefix${current_path:+:$current_path}"`.

Every call site now ends up with PATH = preferred-dirs-in-declared-
order, followed by the original PATH, with de-duplication against
the snapshot (so nothing already on PATH is duplicated).

Files touched (identical pattern, adapted to each helper's naming):
  * scripts/lib/cheatsheet.sh  : cheatsheet_prepend_user_paths
  * scripts/lib/info.sh        : info_prepend_user_paths
  * scripts/lib/smoke_test.sh  : _smoke_prepend_user_paths
  * scripts/lib/status.sh      : status_prepend_user_paths

tests/unit/lib/test_update.bats
-------------------------------
Extends the bats suite with 60 lines asserting the new ordering
invariant: given ACFS_BIN_DIR plus three fallback toolchains that
all exist, PATH comes back with ACFS_BIN_DIR in position 1 and
the fallbacks in declared order, regardless of the pre-existing
PATH value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -298,6 +298,9 @@ cheatsheet_prepend_user_paths() {
   local base_home="$1"
   local dir=""
   local primary_bin_dir=""
+  local current_path="${PATH:-}"
+  local seen_path=":${current_path}:"
+  local -a to_prepend=()
 
   [[ -n "$base_home" ]] || return 0
   primary_bin_dir="$(cheatsheet_sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
@@ -313,13 +316,21 @@ cheatsheet_prepend_user_paths() {
     "$base_home/.atuin/bin" \
     "$base_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin"; do
     [[ -d "$dir" ]] || continue
-    case ":$PATH:" in
+    case "$seen_path" in
       *":$dir:"*) ;;
-      *) export PATH="$dir:$PATH" ;;
+      *)
+        to_prepend+=("$dir")
+        seen_path="${seen_path}${dir}:"
+        ;;
     esac
   done
-}
 
+  if [[ ${#to_prepend[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
+    local prefix=""
+    prefix="$(IFS=:; printf '%s' "${to_prepend[*]}")"
+    export PATH="$prefix${current_path:+:$current_path}"
+  fi
+}
 
 cheatsheet_prepare_context() {
   local state_file=""

     local dir=""

     [[ -n "$base_home" ]] || return 0

-        case ":$PATH:" in

             *":$dir:"*) ;;
-            *) export PATH="$dir:$PATH" ;;
+            *)
+                to_prepend+=("$dir")
+                seen_path="${seen_path}${dir}:"
+                ;;
         esac
     done
+
+    if [[ ${#to_prepend[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
+        local prefix=""
+        prefix="$(IFS=:; printf '%s' "${to_prepend[*]}")"
+        export PATH="$prefix${current_path:+:$current_path}"
+    fi
 }
 
 info_binary_path() {

@@ -635,6 +635,9 @@ _smoke_prepend_user_paths() {

         "$base_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin"; do

+    if [[ ${#to_prepend[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then

@@ -2024,6 +2024,66 @@ EOF
     assert_output --partial $'gbq	gcloud bq	alias'
 }
 
+@test "info.sh: prepend_user_paths preserves primary bin priority" {
+    local info_lib="$PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/lib/info.sh"
+    local test_home
+    local expected_path=""
+
+    test_home="$(create_temp_dir)"
+    mkdir -p "$test_home/custom-bin" "$test_home/.acfs/bin" "$test_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin"
+
+    info_preferred_bin_dir() { printf '%s\n' "$ACFS_BIN_DIR"; }
+    # shellcheck disable=SC1090
+    eval "$(sed -n '/^info_prepend_user_paths()/,/^}$/p' "$info_lib")"
+
+    export ACFS_BIN_DIR="$test_home/custom-bin"
+    PATH="/usr/bin:/bin"
+    info_prepend_user_paths "$test_home"
+
+    expected_path="$test_home/custom-bin:$test_home/.acfs/bin:$test_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
+    [ "$PATH" = "$expected_path" ]
+}
+
+@test "status.sh: prepend_user_paths preserves primary bin priority" {
+    local status_lib="$PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/lib/status.sh"
+    local test_home
+    local expected_path=""
+
+    test_home="$(create_temp_dir)"
+    mkdir -p "$test_home/custom-bin" "$test_home/.acfs/bin" "$test_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin"
+
+    _status_preferred_bin_dir() { printf '%s\n' "$ACFS_BIN_DIR"; }
+    # shellcheck disable=SC1090
+    eval "$(sed -n '/^_status_prepend_user_paths()/,/^}$/p' "$status_lib")"
+
+    export ACFS_BIN_DIR="$test_home/custom-bin"
+    PATH="/usr/bin:/bin"
+    _status_prepend_user_paths "$test_home"
+
+    expected_path="$test_home/custom-bin:$test_home/.acfs/bin:$test_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
+    [ "$PATH" = "$expected_path" ]
+}
+
+@test "smoke_test.sh: prepend_user_paths preserves primary bin priority" {
+    local smoke_lib="$PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/lib/smoke_test.sh"
+    local test_home
+    local expected_path=""
+
+    test_home="$(create_temp_dir)"
+    mkdir -p "$test_home/custom-bin" "$test_home/.acfs/bin" "$test_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin"
+
+    _smoke_preferred_bin_dir() { printf '%s\n' "$ACFS_BIN_DIR"; }
+    # shellcheck disable=SC1090
+    eval "$(sed -n '/^_smoke_prepend_user_paths()/,/^}$/p' "$smoke_lib")"
+
+    export ACFS_BIN_DIR="$test_home/custom-bin"
+    PATH="/usr/bin:/bin"
+    _smoke_prepend_user_paths "$test_home"
+
+    expected_path="$test_home/custom-bin:$test_home/.acfs/bin:$test_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
+    [ "$PATH" = "$expected_path" ]
+}
+
 @test "info.sh: binary helper ignores current-shell-only PATH entries" {
     local info_lib="$PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/lib/info.sh"
